CREATE TABLE session_variables (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, var_name VARCHAR(255), var_value VARCHAR(255));

<?vsp
    declare rc integer;
    connection_vars_set ();
    rc := connection_is_dirty (); -- rc is equal to 0
  ?>
UPDATE session_variables SET var_value = '2' WHERE var_name = 'user_id';

<?vsp
    rc := connection_is_dirty (); -- rc is equal to 1
  ?>
SELECT user_id, session_token FROM session_variables WHERE user_id IN (SELECT var_value FROM session_variables WHERE var_name = 'user_id');

<?vsp

    rc := connection_is_dirty (); -- rc is equal to 0

    rc := connection_is_dirty (); -- rc is equal to 1

CREATE TABLE user_sessions (session_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, login_time TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES session_variables(id));
INSERT INTO user_sessions (user_id, login_time) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM session_variables WHERE var_name = 'user_id'), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_sessions WHERE user_id = (SELECT var_value FROM session_variables WHERE var_name = 'user_id');
